response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership experience across diverse tech stacks and domains, with clear architectural and mentoring capabilities. However, his German proficiency is only listed as 'Basic,' which falls significantly short of the required C1 level, and there is no explicit evidence of executive-level project oversight or formal technical leadership of teams beyond individual contributor roles.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js, DLang), and modern architectures
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and DevOps practices
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' — fails to meet C1 requirement
Lack of explicit evidence in resume of managing client projects or providing executive-level architectural advice
No clear UML or formal requirements management experience documented despite being required
